name: Chocolate Peanut Buddy Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. In a large bowl, blend peanut butter and butter until smooth.
3. Add sugar, eggs, and vanilla; beat until creamy.
4. Blend in flour and salt.
5. Stir in chocolate chips.
6. Spread mixture into an ungreased 13 x 9 inch pan.
7. Bake for 25-30 minutes, or until edges begin to brown.
8. Immediately sprinkle remaining chocolate chips on top.
9. Let stand for 5 minutes until the morsels become shiny and soft.
10. Spread evenly over the top.
11. Allow to cool completely.
12. Cut into 1 1/2 inch bars.
